title: The Alzheimer's Cell Atlas: A comprehensive brain single‐cell transcriptomic atlas using a generative AI foundation model
authors: Jielin Xu; Yadi Zhou; Noah J Lorincz‐Comi; Lijun Dou; Yuan Hou; Yunguang Qiu; Andrew A. Pieper; Feixiong Cheng
abstract: Studying Alzheimer's Disease (AD) at the single‐cell level is essential for uncovering its complex biology, such as identifying disease‐associated cell states and decoding their molecular mechanisms, also even designing personalized treatment strategies.
